summary: Iteration 25 — Compute Credits Kill Switch backend verification. Wrote pytest suite covering subscriptions/status compute block, 403 enforcement on /run-agent and /dashboard/agents/{id}/run for depleted free user, webhook killswitch on owner credits, admin unlimited bypass, and per-dispatch increment. All 7 tests passed.

minor.issue: compute.tier returns 'free' (from users.tier default) while top-level status returns tier 'recruit'. Inconsistent labeling between the two fields. Not breaking but confusing for clients.
Tier label 'free' is mapped to TIER_LIMITS but never normalized to 'recruit'. Consider unifying the canonical free-tier name.

Kill switch runs BEFORE the firewall/rate-limit gates but mark_execution_active/done is not involved — fine. However increment_compute_usage is called even if the background worker later fails (dispatch-based billing) — documented behaviour, just flag.

action_items: (Optional) Normalise free-tier label between subscriptions.status.tier ('recruit') and compute.tier ('free').
(Optional) Document dispatch-based billing semantics in API docs (credit consumed even if background worker fails).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2170 lines — consider splitting auth, dashboard agents, webhook, csdrop into modules.
Webhook killswitch uses db.users.find_one without projection so MongoDB _id leaks into the in-memory dict; not exposed to client but still untidy.
check_compute_credits/check identifies user via user.get('id', user.get('email')). If a future code path passes a dict without 'id', usage will be tracked by email — fine but worth a comment.
agent.py /run-agent dispatches in BackgroundTasks but counts the execution before the worker actually runs; failures in audit_prompt fall back to SAFE silently — acceptable but should be logged.
test_credentials: freeuser@test.com / test123 (100/100 used in 2026-05); admin@nova.ai / admin123 (role=admin, unlimited)
seed_data_creation: Test transiently creates: (a) a TEST_ webhook agent for the free user (deleted in finally); (b) a TEST_compute_* registered user with a TEST_increment_agent (fully cleaned up at end of test_increment_after_dashboard_run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compute kill switch is fully implemented and verified. Free user freeuser@test.com is at 100/100 for period 2026-05 (system clock is May 2026). All three execution paths return 403 with structured detail. Admin bypass confirmed. Increment confirmed via fresh user. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_compute_kill_switch.py — 7 tests, ~3s runtime.
